{{# def.definitions }} {{# def.errors }} {{# def.setupKeyword }} {{# def.$data }} {{# def.numberKeyword }} var division{{=$lvl}}; if ({{?$isData}} {{=$schemaValue}} !== undefined && ( typeof {{=$schemaValue}} != 'number' || {{?}} (division{{=$lvl}} = {{=$data}} / {{=$schemaValue}}, {{? it.opts.multipleOfPrecision }} Math.abs(Math.round(division{{=$lvl}}) - division{{=$lvl}}) > 1e-{{=it.opts.multipleOfPrecision}} {{??}} division{{=$lvl}} !== parseInt(division{{=$lvl}}) {{?}} ) {{?$isData}} ) {{?}} ) { {{# def.error:'multipleOf' }} } {{? $breakOnError }} else { {{?}}
